player_notes.victor wembanyama: OUT Wednesday vs. Trail Blazers with bruised left rib. Monitor status for today's game vs. Dallas.
player_notes.stephon castle: OUT Wednesday vs. Trail Blazers with sore right knee. Monitor status for today's game vs. Dallas.
player_notes.cade cunningham: Returned from 11-game absence (collapsed lung) Wednesday, posting 13 pts/10 ast. Minutes likely managed; treat as day-to-day with potential restriction.
player_notes.luka doncic: Injured and sidelined; Lakers' title odds lengthening due to his and Austin Reaves' injuries. Avoid Doncic props until cleared.
player_notes.jayson tatum: Returned this season from Achilles injury. No new availability concern flagged, but monitor workload management as playoffs approach.

game_notes.DAL vs SAS: Wembanyama (bruised rib) and Castle (knee) were out Wednesday; if still out today vs. Dallas, significant usage boost for De'Aaron Fox and other Spurs. Dallas is 25-55 and short-handed — elevated pace/scoring likely for healthy Spurs.
game_notes.DET vs CHA: Cunningham returned Wednesday but may face minutes restriction in final regular-season games. Pistons are 58-22 and clinched; rest/load management possible.
